title: coprosma setulosa
intro: Coprosma setulosa, also known as the scrub forget-me-not, is a shrub-like plant native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are thought to be beneficial in treating wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Coprosma setulosa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Coprosma setulosa can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health concerns.
